# "Victory in the Valley"
## Scripture
"For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worth comparing with the glory that is to be revealed to us." – Romans 8:18
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we face battles every day. Some may seem insurmountable, while others may feel like a never-ending valley of dry bones. But it's in these moments that we are reminded of our hope – not in the present struggles, but in the glory that awaits us. Just as the Israelites were led through the wilderness by a cloud by day and a pillar of fire by night, we too are guided by the presence of God. He leads us through the darkest valleys, into the light of His presence, where we find strength and comfort.

As we navigate the challenges of life, let us not focus on the present difficulties, but on the promise of His glory. Let us stand firm in our faith, trusting that He who began a good work in us will see it through to completion.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 1 mile while praising God for His presence in your life."
